indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: No stove, oven, or microwave is visible, making it impossible to cook in this space.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is essential for food preparation and kitchen hygiene.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring is not suitable for food preparation as it can be difficult to clean and maintain.

indicators.name: no hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertop or hard washable work surface is present, which is required for all food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: artwork on the wall
indicators.rationale: Artwork on the wall is not related to cooking and does not contribute to the functionality of the space.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking. There are no cooking appliances, no sink, and no hard prep surfaces, making it impossible to prepare or cook food in this space.
